result.stdout:
Usage:
csharp2ts [options]

From Config File:
--config, -c <path to config>        Path to the config file

CLI Options:
--model-assembly-path, -ma <path>    Path(s) to the assembly containing the models (comma-separated for multiple)
--model-output-folder, -mo <path>    Path to the output folder for the generated models
--services-assembly-path, -sa <path> Path(s) to the assembly containing the services (comma-separated for multiple)
--services-output-folder, -so <path> Path to the output folder for the generated services
--service-generator, -sg <name>      Service generator to use (axios)
--file-casing, -fc <style>           File name casing style (camel | pascal | kebab)
--member-casing, -mc <style>         Casing style of TS members (camel | pascal)
--nullable-strings                   Mark string properties as nullable in the generated code
--type-mapping, -tm <mapping>        Custom type mapping in format CSharpFullName=tsType (repeatable)

Commands:
create-config                        Create a default config file
